acceptance_criteria: 1) sub_lm setting is consumed when creating runtime LlmTools. 2) Missing sub_lm behavior is explicit and tested. 3) Loop metadata/feedback reflects calls made through the selected LM.
description: Connect RlmBuilder sub_lm configuration to runtime tool construction so Python llm_query calls use the intended subordinate LM. Define behavior when sub_lm is absent (explicit config error or documented fallback).
title: Wire sub_lm into runtime tools selection
